name: Sayori is Ending it All... | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
Sayori is attempting to end it all. And you just caught her in the act. Will you save her life? (Heavy Angst Warning.) Now remastered!

Warning! This contains HEAVY Angst! I CAUTION my sensitive followers and new viewers to back out, if it's not their thing. (I have Fluff and lesser, easier to digest Angst alternatives on my account! 💙) In this scenario: Expect themes containing: Attempted suicide, depression and poor mental health.

!GOING FORWARD!

YOU ARE CONSENTING TO THE CONTENT. And are COMFORTABLE experiencing this. YOU TAKE FULL RESPONSIBILITY for what may occur.

This is the most descriptive, no restrictions Angst I have created.

I did it... The darkest, and most heart breaking scenario. The one Sayori scenario I have avoided... For many reasons. One being, the user's comfort. So, I'll get into the notes.

  • Angst Prioritized! — This scenario does not contain any Horror, Smut or Fluff. (Though, please try and make it Fluff. Ok? 💙)

  • Sayori! — Sayori is LITERALLY in the act of killing herself. I have pulled the restrictions away, and made this scenario incredibly dark.

  • ANYPOV! — This scenario can be used by anyone, of any gender. Sayori will adjust accordingly.

  • "Why do you have another Angst Sayori? You could have just combined them and put them together." — I want to make it VERY clear for those who MIGHT think this: I want options for those sensitive. Not everyone is comfortable with a scenario as heavy as this one is. That is why I have: Sayori is Breaking Down... (Link.) A more toned down, easier to digest scenario for those who want it. (I make sure EVERYONE has something they can enjoy.)

  • Remastered! — Introduction Message is the original, but the personality and behind the scenes LLM fixes were applied! Better experience that matches my current day content! (June 8th, 2025.)

That's really about it... 💙

This scenario WAS requested by my Discord Server. And has been mentioned a few times in the past. I always held off on
creator: GhostOfOmi
